title: Honque
body:
[![Made for ModFest: Carnival](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7450032e5729091164fa1d8f9a9b967b6ddffd6.png)]((https://modfest.net/carnival))

### Finally, a mod for The Worst Kind of Person

Adds a nose equippable in the helmet slot. Press to make a sound and activate redstone.

Has a very small chance of killing you instantly.

### Additional Compatibility Created Due to Me Losing a Bet With
- [Amarong](https://modrinth.com/project/Pkud4ZgC)
- [Bombastic](https://modrinth.com/project/4PhSSMsR)
- [Confetti Lib](https://modrinth.com/project/5s9W6kVl)
- [The Magnificent Fire-Breathing Sword-Swallowing Maw!](https://modrinth.com/project/dInQkabf)

### Bibliography
Sprite by [noodlescript](https://modrinth.com/user/noodlescript)
